title: Retractable Dog Lead 360°Tangle-Free-Extendable Dog Lead 5M/16FT Smooth & Durable-Anti-Slip Handle Grip with Strong Nylon Tape Belt-One-Handed Brake Easy To Use for Small Medium Dogs (PINK, 5 METER)
features: 1- COMFORTABLE FREEDOM DOG LEAD - Sheen dog retractable lead feel totally free with our specifically made leashes,you can maintain control in case something happens.

2- HIGH QUALITY LEASHES - Dog retractable leash model features an ergonomic and "tangle-free" design that is hand-assembled and put through numerous tests to guarantee that you and your dog are in the finest hands when going for your morning stroll, no matter where you happen to be.

3- STRONG ANTI-TANGLE DESIGN - Enjoy a stress-free stroll with a 360-degree tangle-free inlet; your dog won't twist around on you. Excellent for outdoor activities including hiking, camping, and strolling. It won't cause any hand pain when smoothly retracted or released at any angle.

4- ERGONOMIC NON-SLIP HANDLE - Even on lengthy tracks, the ergonomic handle and the soft, non-slip material reduce hand fatigue.It fits in your hand like a rubber glove. Description of age range: All Life Stages

5- SIMPLE & EASY TO USE - Sheen dog retractable leash button to quickly lock, pause, and unlock is simple to use with your thumb.Permit you to change the distance you keep from your dogs at any time, and ensure the security of other pedestrians and pets.

6- EXCELLENT CUSTOMER SERVICE - Sheen brand is committed to providing the highest quality products and peace of mind. We promise to prioritize customer satisfaction and deliver products that meet your expectations.
description: Product description Retractable Dog Lead, 3M/5M/16FT Extendable Dog Lead 360°Tangle-Free Smooth&Durable Nylon Tape with Anti-Slip Handle, One-Handed Brake for Small Medium Dogs Directions Use Dog Leads under your supervision
